violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. Blend in cup smoothie/frappe machine was only cleaned and sanitized weekly. Food contact surfaces must be sanitized every four hours. Documentation should be provided to ensure compliance with food code.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Hole in the wall under the wall station counter.
